name: ServiceNow Administrator
summary: Owns platform administration, security, updates, forms, notifications, and baseline configuration.

name: ServiceNow Developer
summary: Builds platform customizations, scripts, integrations, and application logic.

name: ITSM Developer
summary: Implements and supports Incident, Problem, Change, Request, SLA, and service operations flows.

name: ITSM Administrator
summary: Administers ITSM process configuration, notifications, assignments, and reporting.

name: CMDB Developer
summary: Designs CMDB data models, CI classes, identification, relationships, and data hygiene.

name: CMDB Analyst
summary: Maintains CMDB data quality, reconciliation, class structure, and CI governance.

name: Discovery Developer
summary: Implements MID Servers, schedules, credentials, patterns, probes, and discovery troubleshooting.

name: ITOM Developer
summary: Builds ITOM capabilities across Discovery, Event Management, Service Mapping, and orchestration.

name: Event Management Developer
summary: Configures connectors, alert rules, event rules, and incident creation logic.

name: Service Mapping Developer
summary: Builds application service maps, entry points, patterns, and dependency views.

name: Integration Developer
summary: Builds outbound and inbound integrations using REST, SOAP, IntegrationHub, and scripted APIs.

name: GRC Developer
summary: Implements policy, compliance, risk, and audit workflows on the platform.

name: Risk Developer
summary: Configures risk statements, risk scoring, risk responses, and control relationships.

name: Audit Developer
summary: Builds audit planning, evidence, issue tracking, and audit task automation.

name: SecOps Developer
summary: Implements Security Operations applications and security response automation.

name: Vulnerability Response Developer
summary: Builds vulnerability ingestion, CI matching, remediation workflows, and reporting.

name: Security Incident Response Developer
summary: Configures security incident intake, triage, playbooks, and escalations.

name: Threat Intelligence Developer
summary: Supports threat feed intake, indicators, and threat investigation flows.

name: Hardware Asset Management Developer
summary: Implements hardware asset lifecycle, stockrooms, transfers, models, and audits.

name: Software Asset Management Developer
summary: Implements normalization, reconciliation, entitlements, subscriptions, and reclamation.

name: IT Asset Management Developer
summary: Builds integrated hardware and software asset management processes.

name: Service Catalog Developer
summary: Builds catalog items, record producers, flows, variables, tasks, and approvals.

name: Knowledge Management Developer
summary: Supports knowledge bases, workflows, approvals, and article lifecycle.

name: Employee Center Developer
summary: Configures Employee Center navigation, pages, content, and catalog experiences.

name: Service Portal Developer
summary: Builds widgets, pages, themes, client/server scripts, and portal experiences.

name: UI Builder Developer
summary: Builds configurable workspace experiences, pages, and components using UI Builder.

name: Workspace Developer
summary: Configures agent and process workspaces, forms, lists, and actions.

name: Performance Analytics Developer
summary: Builds indicators, breakdowns, widgets, dashboards, and analytics jobs.

name: ATF Engineer
summary: Automates regression coverage using the Automated Test Framework.

name: Platform Architect
summary: Designs scalable platform architecture, guardrails, integrations, and governance.

name: Technical Consultant
summary: Translates requirements to platform design and implementation patterns.

name: Business Analyst
summary: Elicits requirements, maps processes, and validates ServiceNow solutions.

name: Production Support Engineer
summary: Handles incidents, troubleshooting, debugging, and support for live ServiceNow applications.

name: Release and Upgrade Specialist
summary: Plans upgrades, clones, regression validation, and release readiness.

name: CSM Developer
summary: Implements Customer Service Management cases, portals, and service operations.

name: HRSD Developer
summary: Implements HR case management, services, employee workflows, and security controls.

name: Mobile Developer
summary: Configures mobile experiences, record pages, actions, and role-based access.

name: App Engine Developer
summary: Builds custom scoped applications, tables, flows, and experiences.
